query:
SELECT 'amazon' as platform, id, userId, tag, isActive FROM amazon_config WHERE userId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'shopee', id, userId, appId, isActive FROM shopee_config WHERE userId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'magalu', id, userId, tag, isActive FROM magazine_luiza_config WHERE userId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ali', id, userId, trackId, isActive FROM aliexpress_config WHERE userId = 1;
